title: meniw-protocol: runtime governance layer that enforces the Meniw Protocol inside AI agents
description: Open reference implementation of the Meniw Protocol (Universal Declaration / Constitution of AI Agents, by Chris Meniw). It enforces the Protocol BY CONSTRUCTION inside an autonomous AI agent: a pre-action gate blocks prohibited actions before they execute (they raise and never run), irreversible actions require two distinct co-signers (two-person rule), and every decision emits a verifiable, tamper-evident compliance receipt (hash-chained, anchored to the norm's SHA-256, checkable with the meniw-verify CLI). Adapters for OpenAI tool-calling, LangChain and MCP. Distributed on PyPI as 'meniw-protocol'. License CC BY 4.0.
